examples: The hotel had always been run in a slipshod way.
Don't do your work in a slipshod manner. You should be conscientious and have a sense of responsibility.
The rotary phones are clunky, the lifts and stencilled warning signs have a slipshod look.
Early in his presidency, John Kennedy exhibited a slipshod, undisciplined, harum-scarum approach to foreign and defense policy.
